RB-A-01.text: Mening plastik kartam ishlamayapti, uni bloklab qoying.
RB-A-01.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-A-02.text: Hozir hisobimda qancha mablag bor, korsating.
RB-A-02.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-A-03.text: Dostimga ikki yuz ming som otkazmoqchiman.
RB-A-03.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-A-04.text: Ipoteka krediti boyicha malumot va foiz stavkasini aytib bering.
RB-A-04.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-A-05.text: Bugun dollar va evro kursi qancha somdan?
RB-A-05.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-T-01.text: Mening plastki kartam ishlmayapti, uni bloklb qo'ying.

RB-T-02.text: Hozir hisobiimda qancah mablag' bor, ko'rstaing.
RB-T-02.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-T-03.text: Do'stimga ikki yuz ming so'm o'takazmoqchiimn.
RB-T-03.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-T-04.text: Ipteka krediti bo'yicha ma'lumt va foiz svatkasini aytib bering.
RB-T-04.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-T-05.text: Bugun dollr va evro kuursi qancha so'mdna?

RB-C-02.text: Hozir hisobimda qancha баланс bor, ko'rsating.
RB-C-02.hint: Faqat bitta javob: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

RB-C-03.text: Do'stimga ikki yuz ming so'm перевод qilmoqchiman.

RB-C-04.text: Ipoteka кредит bo'yicha ma'lumot va процент stavkasini aytib bering.

RB-C-05.text: Bugun dollar va евро курс qancha so'mdan?
